{{Quote|If you think you're going to scare us off by cozying up to the Mandalorians, Bug Boy, you've got another thing coming.|Hebanh Del Dalhe to [[Sass Sikili]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>}}
'''Hebanh Del Dalhe''' was a representative of the [[Murkhanan Department of Trade and Industry]]; he transmitted a message to the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] criticizing their allegiance with the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
